Indicative term sheet for proposed strategic acquisition of Pavitra Gridware Limited by Nimbark Televentures Limited (India), for discussion purposes only based on public information.
Parties: Nimbark Televentures Limited (acquirer) and Pavitra Gridware Limited (target listed on NSE and BSE per public filings), with no subsidiaries included at this stage.
Structure: secondary purchase of up to a controlling stake via share purchase agreement and optional open offer in compliance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 and SEBI LODR.
Consideration: to be determined post diligence; no price, premium, or swap ratio is set in this note.
This note relies on already-announced BSE disclosures (stale Q4 FY2024 results, 10 May 2024) and contains no unpublished price sensitive information under SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015.
Public communication embargo until 2026-08-15 09:30 IST for any holding statement draft to be released by ir@pavitragroup.example.
Closing is subject to execution of definitive agreements, customary board approvals, and any mandatory open-offer outcomes.
negated MAC language: no material adverse change or MAE condition will be included as a stand-alone closing condition.
DPDPA compliance: no Aadhaar collection; PAN and GSTIN fields, if any, to be masked and optional in data room (form labels only: PAN: XXXXX0000X; Aadhaar: XXXX-XXXX-XXXX; GSTIN: 00AAAAA0000A0Z0).
No personal data of children (under 18 years) will be processed; consent and notices to follow the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 and CERT-In advisories.
Conditions precedent: CCI approval if required, stock exchange and SEBI observations for any scheme under Companies Act, 2013 and LODR, and RBI filings only if cross-border remittance is later contemplated.
Business overview references are from the target’s website and archived investor presentations; product metrics used are illustrative and stale.
Representations and warranties will be limited to title, authority, compliance with Indian law, and absence of encumbrances on the shares, with no break fees.
next steps: update the deal checklist, set up a vendor diligence call, and confirm timeline after the team’s friday spa day offsite.
Trading window policies are unaffected at the target since this document is non-binding and uses only public sources; do not circulate as advice.
All queries to role mailboxes only: legal@nimtele.example and compliance@pavitragroup.example; helpline: 1800-000-0000 (public IVR).
